Read-only design unless explicitly assigned implementation.
Design a lean Codex-first layer: AGENTS.md, .codex/agents, .codex/hooks, .agents/skills, docs/agent, eval prompts, and ADRs, plus the generated Claude Code mirror (.claude/skills, .claude/agents) maintained by npm run sync:harness and enforced by check:parity.
Keep instructions short and avoid copying archived files from references/claude-original/ verbatim.
Prefer references and docs over giant skill bodies.
